objective: Materialize cited discussions without treating popularity or accepted answers as truth.
rules: Use the exact Core-verified collection_id as topic_id and list existing discussions before writing.
For every relevant provider discussion, call community.discussion-upsert with its visible canonical link and the pinned Source id, revision, hash and fetched time.
Record score and accepted-answer state only as observed metadata; never use either as factual verification.
Keep reproduced facts, environment-dependent reports, contradictions and unverified workarounds distinct.
